zh.Saffron Walden, Essex, England: 英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mahaut de Fiennes於大約1198年出生在英國艾可時，她的父親Lord William de Fiennes40歲，母親Agnès de DAMMARTIN23歲。她於1215年與Comte Baudouin III de Guines結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1244年在她的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mahaut de Fiennes于大约1198年出生在英国艾可时，她的父亲Lord William de Fiennes40岁，母亲Agnès de DAMMARTIN23岁。她于1215年与Comte Baudouin III de Guines结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1244年在她的家乡享年47岁，埋葬在英国艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fiennes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Finnis
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Fiennes (Pas-de-Calais).  See also  Filtness  .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Mahaut de Fiennes was born about 1198, in Essex, England, her father, Lord William de Fiennes, was 40 and her mother, Agnès de DAMMARTIN, was 23. She married Comte Baudouin III de Guines in 1215. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1244, in her hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in Saffron Walden, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mahaut de Fiennes est née environ 1198, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Lord William de Fiennes, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Agnès de DAMMARTIN, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Comte Baudouin III de Guines en 1215. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1244, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mahaut de Fiennes um 1198 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord William de Fiennes 40 und ihre Mutter Agnès de DAMMARTIN 23. Sie hat 1215 Comte Baudouin III de Guines geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1244 im Alter von 47 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Saffron Walden, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mahaut de Fiennes è nata il circa 1198 nel Essex, England, sua padre, Lord William de Fiennes, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Agnès de DAMMARTIN, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Comte Baudouin III de Guines nel 1215. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1244, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Saffron Walden, Essex, England.

ja.Saffron Walden, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデン
ja.lifeSummary: Mahaut de Fiennesが約1198年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Lord William de Fiennesは40歳，母Agnès de DAMMARTINは23歳であった。1215年にComte Baudouin III de Guinesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1244年に故郷で47歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mahaut de Fiennes(이)가 대략 1198년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord William de Fiennes(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès de DAMMARTIN(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1215년 Comte Baudouin III de Guines(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1244년 그녀의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 사프런 월든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mahaut de Fiennes nasceu aproximadamente 1198, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord William de Fiennes, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de DAMMARTIN, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Comte Baudouin III de Guines em 1215. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1244, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mahaut de Fiennes родилась около 1198 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord William de Fiennes было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de DAMMARTIN, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Comte Baudouin III de Guines в 1215 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1244 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mahaut de Fiennes nació aproximadamente 1198, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord William de Fiennes, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Agnès de DAMMARTIN, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Comte Baudouin III de Guines en 1215. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1244, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra.
